title: Oil prices today: Crude falls below $100 as Trump announces two-week ceasefire
description: Oil prices plummeted below $100 per barrel following President Trump's announcement of a two-week ceasefire with Iran, contingent on reopening the Strait of Hormuz. This development eased fears of supply disruptions, leading to the steepest oil decline in nearly six years. Despite the truce, analysts caution that risks to oil supply remain elevated due to ongoing tensions.

title: Iran 10-point plan says U.S. must accept uranium enrichment, lift all sanctions
description: Iran claimed victory and said in a statement, released alongside a list of the 10 points published by state media, that the plan would require “continued Iranian control over the Strait of Hormuz, acceptance of enrichment, lifting of all primary and secondary sanctions”

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: A do-or-die battle for major fronts, their skippers
description: Having been in the political wilderness for a decade, the UDF  cannot afford to sit out of power for another five years. For the LDF, which suffered a series of setbacks in the Assembly bypolls, the Lok Sabha elections, and the local body polls, the April 9 Assembly elections will be a test of its credentials.  For the National Democratic Alliance too the polls will be decisive, having seen a slump in their vote share in the local body elections

description: AWS CEO Matt Garman acknowledged the Iran war's significant challenges, with employees working 24/7 to maintain services in the Middle East.  Disruptions have been reported in Bahrain and the UAE, impacting data centers. Despite these difficulties, Garman expressed strong optimism for long-term investment and growth in the region's entrepreneurial landscape.

He dismissed criticism that their wealth should be used for Earth-based problems. Isaacman believes progress in space benefits all humankind. He highlighted that space exploration offers long-term transformative potential. Isaacman himself is a participant in the billionaire space club.

The airline's engineers are assessing the extensive damage, which is expected to ground the aircraft for several days. An inquiry has been initiated by the airport authority.

Construction workers and factory hands cite exorbitant costs, with some stating two days' wages barely cover a kilogram of LPG.  This exodus highlights the severe economic strain impacting livelihoods.

Gandhi's recent campaign in Puducherry also saw him avoid mentioning DMK leader M.K. Stalin, suggesting underlying friction between the parties.

description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah strongly condemned Congress chief Mallikarjun Kharge's "illiterate" jibe at BJP supporters and his venomous snake analogy for the RSS and BJP. Shah asserted that such remarks are undemocratic and urged voters to decisively defeat the Congress in upcoming elections, stating the party has become a threat to the democratic system under Rahul Gandhi's leadership.

title: U.S. disrupts Russian military-run DNS hijacking network, Justice Department says

title: Amid Iran war, government extends freeze on channel TRPs
description: Television rating points for news channels have been suspended for another four weeks by the information and broadcasting ministry. This decision, citing concerns over sensationalizing the West Asia conflict, aims to curb unwarranted sensationalism and speculative content. The move, following a previous suspension linked to alleged manipulation, signals increased regulatory oversight during crises.

title: NFL Trade Rumors: San Francisco 49ers could land $90M New York Giants Pro Bowler
description: The San Francisco 49ers bounced back on the field in the last season with 12 wins and 5 losses after a rocky season in 2024, when the team recorded just 6 wins and 11 losses, impressing fans. As the team witnessed a brutal loss in the Divisional Round against the Seattle Seahawks, it seems the San Francisco 49ers are working on fixing their roster, ahead of the new season.

title: West Bengal polls: Appellate tribunal accepts Aadhaar card in first SIR appeal
description: An appellate tribunal ruled that Motab Shaikh and Motab Herul are the same person, accepting his Aadhaar card as proof of identity after the Election Commission failed to provide reasons for his exclusion. The tribunal noted discrepancies in voter lists and relied on supporting documents like Aadhaar, passport, and driving license to establish his identity.

description: The Supreme Court clarified that using the word "bastard" alone, without sexual intent, doesn't constitute obscenity under IPC Section 294. Justices noted that such terms, common in heated arguments, don't inherently appeal to prurient interests.

This weather pattern is expected to continue on Wednesday, with temperatures predicted to rise significantly from Thursday onwards, potentially reaching 37 degrees Celsius by April 12.

Social media users questioned his choices and shared sharp opinions. Reports from The Mirror and NewsBreak highlight how one post quickly turned into a wider debate about public image and personal associations.

description: India faces significant external shocks from the Middle East crisis, impacting energy markets, trade, and supply chains. Disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz are increasing costs for exporters and importers, with sectors like agriculture and labour-intensive industries particularly vulnerable. Higher energy prices and potential slowdowns in Gulf economies could lead to sustained inflation and slower growth for India.

Rodgers, Steelers eye $82M move for ex-Giants All-Pro star
description: The Pittsburgh Steelers are being linked to Dexter Lawrence II following his trade request from the New York Giants, but the situation is far from straightforward. While connections with Patrick Graham and available cap space make the move plausible, Lawrence’s projected $82 million contract and recent dip in production raise valid concerns. Under new head coach Mike McCarthy, the Steelers appear to be redefining their identity, possibly leaning toward younger, cheaper talent. That makes this potential deal as risky as it is tempting.

description: Asmongold was banned from Twitch for a week after making a controversial remark. He defended himself online, claiming a “double standard” in enforcement. 'Dhurandhar 2' collection day 20: Ranveer Singh film surges past Rs. 1,025 crore
description: Aditya Dhar’s 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' has scripted history as the first Hindi film to breach the Rs. 1,000 crore India net milestone. Globally, the thriller has amassed Rs. 1,622.72 crore, outperforming blockbusters like Jawan. Despite the IPL 2026 season and a 229-minute runtime, the film remains a powerhouse. To boost family viewership, makers have released updated prints with muted abuses and technical fixes. Now the third-highest-grossing Indian film globally, the spy saga eyes the Rs. 1,700 crore mark.

title: Chiefs linked to $83M 49ers star amid contract uncertainty
description: NFL trade rumours picked up their momentum after the Kansas City Chiefs reportedly eyed San Francisco 49ers veteran Trent Williams for their left tackle position. With ongoing contract talks between Williams and the 49ers unresolved, the Chiefs are prepared to make a trade. This move comes as Kansas City seeks long-term stability for Patrick Mahomes' blind side, despite drafting Josh Simmons last year.

title: Canada has changed immigration rules; changing visa fee, work permit rules and more
description: Canada's immigration landscape is shifting from April 2026 with passport and citizenship fee increases, offset by a 30-day processing guarantee. Super visa rules are relaxed, allowing sponsors more flexibility. Provinces gain increased autonomy in immigration assessments, while rural employers benefit from expanded foreign worker quotas.
